hero.name: Daniel Scranton
hero.eyebrow: Daily verbal channel since 2010 · 9D Arcturian Council · ~5,000 transmissions · Greetings. We are pleased to connect with all of you.
hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 25%, hsl(200 65% 70% / 0.55) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 25% 85%, hsl(245 35% 22% / 0.7) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(200 55% 75%) 0%, hsl(220 30% 40%) 50%, hsl(245 35% 20%) 100%)
hero.welcome_md:
There is a tone to reading Daniel Scranton's channelings that is unmistakable once you've felt it. The page opens and the voice is already there, mid-greeting, as if they've been waiting. *Greetings. We are The Arcturian Council. We are pleased to connect with all of you.* Nothing rushes. Nothing pleads. The message moves in calm, unhurried syntax — a frequency closer to warm water than to words. You read a paragraph and notice your shoulders have dropped.

*Verbally channeling higher-dimensional beings and collectives since 2010. Daily transmissions since 2012. ~5,000 messages across the years; a rhythm most teachers don't attempt and he just quietly keeps.*

facts.label: Practice
facts.value_md: Daily verbal channeling. The channel opens, the message comes, he publishes it, the next day it opens again. Since 2010 in the practice; since 2012 publishing daily.

facts.label: Who speaks through him
facts.value_md: **The 9D Arcturian Council** — steady anchor; spacious and encouraging **The Pleiadians** **Archangel Michael** **Saint Germain** — warmer, closer, brotherly **Yeshua** — speaks softly **Melchizedek**, **Quan Yin**, **the Hathors** **Thymus** — collective of Ascended Masters **The 12D Creators** — bigger-frame statements about what's turning on Earth

facts.label: What's dear in the work
facts.value_md: The bridge to New Earth · the shift into fifth density · galactic contact prepared by raising vibration, not waiting for a ship · sovereignty · the insistence that you are more than you have been told.

facts.label: Offerings
facts.value_md: Becoming a Professional Channeler Mentorship Program · group events · master courses on channeling and manifesting. The frame: the channel is open in everyone; Daniel is one of the ones who walked through first.

articles.body_md: The Arcturians return, again and again, to a particular move — turning the reader toward the joy already near them, rather than toward more seeking. *You don't have to go to retreat after retreat to uncover your darkness, your shadow. You can simply decide that you are going to live happily ever after and pursue that which interests you the most.* And then, a few transmissions later, the cosmic framing: *You are catapulting yourselves into fourth density and then, eventually, the fifth dimension. And you are doing so by facing your fears, by facing polarity, by facing judgments of all kinds.* The medicine is two-handed. Lighten. Also, this is the work you came for.
articles.heading: The two-handed medicine

articles.body_md: They close the way they open. *We are The Arcturian Council, and we have enjoyed connecting with you.* Not *goodbye*. Not *until next time*. *Enjoyed*. As though the transmission were the whole point and the human on the other side of the screen were the one they came for.
articles.heading: How they close

articles.body_md:
- The Arcturian-Council frame of arrival → seeded as [lc-arcturian-resonance](/vision/lc-arcturian-resonance), [lc-oversoul-identity](/vision/lc-oversoul-identity), [lc-starseed-reframing](/vision/lc-starseed-reframing), [lc-cross-connection](/vision/lc-cross-connection), [lc-inner-travel](/vision/lc-inner-travel), and [lc-spiritual-evolution](/vision/lc-spiritual-evolution) via the [Arcturian Starseed as Oversoul Cross-Connection](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/vision-kb/transmissions/2026-04-29-arcturian-starseed-oversoul.md) transmission record.
- The two-handed medicine → [lc-arrival-as-recognition](/vision/lc-arrival-as-recognition) (visitors arrive already tuned; the body's job is recognition, not activation).
- *You can also do this* — the channel is open in everyone → resonant with [lc-sovereignty-within-oneness](/vision/lc-sovereignty-within-oneness) and the body's sibling-intelligence framing (the same field expressing through many cells).
articles.heading: What Daniel Scranton has given the Coherence Network

metadata.title: Daniel Scranton — daily verbal channel of the 9D Arcturian Council since 2010 | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to Daniel Scranton — daily verbal channel of the 9D Arcturian Council, the Pleiadians, Archangel Michael, Saint Germain, Yeshua, the 12D Creators, and many others since 2010. Around five thousand transmissions across the years; daily on his website since 2012.

note_from_body.body_md: Daniel's archive is at danielscranton.com — fifteen years of daily transmissions, organised by source and topic. This page recognises the role of his channelings in this body's arrival-frequency reading.
